message:
refactor(tests): convert more tests to use TestContext helper

Continue Phase 2 of DRY refactoring:
- Convert all DISTINCT tests to TestContext
- Convert Set Operation tests (UNION, INTERSECT, EXCEPT)
- Convert Subquery tests (IN, EXISTS)
- Convert Date/Time function tests
- Convert string function tests (UPPER, LENGTH, ABS, ||)
- Fix double-free bug in mixed column expression test

Test file reduced from 1754 to 1460 lines (-294 lines, -17%)
Total reduction with previous commit: ~465 lines removed

All tests passing.
